validate.notes: Could not run validation: harness Bash tool is unusable in this session — every command (including `true`, `echo`, `ls`) fails with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/home/worker/.claude/session-env'` before the command itself executes. The underlying task artifacts (Dockerfile, tests, solve.sh) appear intact from prior runs (history shows two earlier passes on different backends); the failure is environmental, not a task defect.
